uplink.description: Data report: +22.50 C, 55.00 %RH, PM2.5 42 ug/m3, 3.6 V
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected normalized from the upstream oracle (Temp 22.5, Humi 55, PM25 42, Volt 3.6).

uplink.description: Data report: negative temp -5.25 C, 88.00 %RH, PM2.5 120, 2.7 V low battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame exercising two's-complement negative temperature and the low-battery high bit (byte3 0x9B). Upstream oracle: Temp -5.25, Humi 88, PM25 120, Volt '2.7(low battery)'.

uplink.description: Data report: zero floor (0.00 C, 0 %RH, PM2.5 0, 3.0 V)
uplink._note: Synthetic lower-bound frame; upstream oracle: Temp 0, Humi 0, PM25 0, Volt 3.
Upstream example startup frame; bytes[2]==0x00 carries software/hardware version + datecode, not a measurement.
Upstream example ConfigReportRsp; fPort 7 carries config, not measurement.
